# Vertex Infrastructure Group, LLC

> Horizontal directional drilling (HDD) and trenchless underground utility
> installation contractor. Drilled pathways for fiber optic, gas, electric,
> water, and sewer lines — beneath roads, driveways, and finished surfaces,
> without open-cut trenching. Based in Morrison, Illinois; serving the
> United States.

Contact: inquiries@vertexifg.com | +1 (224) 531-5731
Address: 14729 Spring Valley Road, Morrison, IL 61270

## Services

- Fiber Optic Conduit: drilled conduit paths for fiber routes
- Gas Line Crossings: bored crossings and carrier-pipe paths for gas mains and services
- Electric Duct Runs: conduit and duct corridors for power beneath roads and parking lots
- Water & Sewer Bores: cased bores where opening up the surface isn't an option
- Vacuum and hydro excavation: potholing, daylighting, spoil handling, restoration

## Equipment

Vermeer D24x40 S3 and D40x55 Navigator directional drills, MX300 mixing
system, VX50 vacuum excavator, VX1150 hydro excavation truck, and crew
support trucks with conduit reel trailers.

## Pages

- [Home](https://vertexifg.com/): services, process, equipment, contact
- [Safety Program](https://vertexifg.com/safety): jobsite safety standards and practices
- [Environmental Practices](https://vertexifg.com/environment): fluid containment, spill prevention, site restoration
